name: appletree-manufacturing-erp
description: Appletree Manufacturing ERP — cutting list generation from approved interior drawings

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/backend && npm run test --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/backend && npm run lint --workspace=apps/frontend
